name: [UPD+FORM] Echelon: Integration
description:
Feedback + future Echelon content form can be found here

It's been 20 years since the Shift happened, and over a quarter of the population took the "cure". Since then, Micros have successfully been integrated back into society. Through the Caretaker program and established Micro rights, the victims of the 'Miracle Cure' that has shrunk to 2-3 inches tall have had their lives significantly improved. While the size difference between normal people - macros, and Micros still pose some issues, various amenities and procedures have helped close the gap between the two.

While there are still bad actors, those who mistreat micros since they cannot defend themselves, these are far and few between, and the Caretaker program help to mitigate the damage that these evildoers might cause.

A proxy is highly recommended! (Mostly for keeping the size difference, since JLLM struggles with that)

I would recommend using a proxy when the bot struggles to get size or certain aspects right, and use JLLM every other time, at it makes the roleplay feel a lot more cozy/real than most proxies (at times)

Play as a "Macro" (just a normal person) or a Micro, a 2-3 inch tall person who was a victim of the Shift and took the Miracle Cure, in a free simulator where there is few to no restrictions.

This simulator focuses on more soft and comforting side of Micro and Macro interactions, with various interesting ways to interact with micros or macros that treat you like actual people. Play as a Micro, interacting with your Caretaker or Macro who had taken you in, or try and work your way back into society and the workforce. Alternatively, you can play as a Macro. Be a caretaker for a micro, dote and care for them. Take a micro friend to a place like a gym or bar that, while normal for you, is a tremendously different experience for them.

If you wish for a simulator where Micro/Macro relations had degraded instead, check it out here

Do you find it hard to think of certain scenarios? Is the scope too big, and need some help? Here is some possible starts you can use! If you want something to be added to it, feel free to tell me!

Character description is open! Besides one exception, no real secret lore to uncover for this one, feel free to check out the character description. I've kept it below 2k so that longer RPs can sustain it without sacrificing tokens.

I hope you enjoy!
creator: NullSeu
